text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, in the central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh, looks like I've got a message from my agent.
Let's see... they need me for some detail shots
after this, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Urk, but I have training then! Why do these
scheduling conflicts keep happening...
choice_data_list: You seem pretty busy. Everything okay?
You seem pretty busy. Everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just you. Thanks for the concern, but I was
the one who decided to take all this on, so it's
fine.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My race is coming up soon, though, so I'm gonna
have a lot on my plate...
choice_data_list: Focus on what's at hand for now!
Would you like an energy drink?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, you're right. I don't have time to be
indecisive.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I've just gotta get things done one at a time...
Okay, I've got this. Thanks for the tip.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? For real? You're a lifesaver. Showing up to a
shoot like a zombie doesn't exactly scream
professional.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Nice, I'm ready to take on the world now. Thanks
again for the drink. I'll do my best at the shoot
and my race.
